title: Ars Lumos
body:
# **Ars Lumos**

An addon for [Ars Nouveau](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ars-nouveau) that makes parts of blocks and mobs glow in the dark, making them feel more magical. (Using emissive textures)

Supports other addons including Ars Elemental and Ars Loafers.

**Requires [NeoContinuity](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/neocontinuity) to work properly.**

Currently glowing:

*   All Archwood logs
*   All Weald Walkers and Waddlers
*   Archwood bark (Ars Delight)
*   Ritual tablets (also supports Ars Elemental, Ars Additions, Ars Caelum and Ars Nouveau Refresh)
*   Source jars
*   Warp portals (nether style)

Might glow in the future:

*   Anything containing a source gem (including items)

You can disable any of these in the config. Use [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured) if you're uncomfortable with editing config files.

[![Available on Modrinth](https://badges.penpow.dev/badges/available/modrinth/cozy.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-lumos)
[![Available on CurseForge](https://badges.penpow.dev/badges/available/curseforge/cozy.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ars-lumos)
